## **2.2.2.K. PI #11**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Data is not available. Information available is limited to Reserved or Segregated Airspace (RSA) \[Malta does not have CDR1 routes\]:

RAI = Rate of Aircraft Interested in reserved/restricted airspace: 64.84%,

RAU = Rate of Actual Use of reserved/restricted airspace: 76.85%,

ERSA = Effective Use of Reserved or Segregated Airspace: 96.38%
